sections.one_line: Core planning dials for event volatility, actor count, and time horizon
Mapping Kernos documentation artifacts to event planning documents and their roles
Starter document and workstream structure for planning an event
Phase-based rules for escalating event planning, monitoring workstreams, vendors, guests, budget, and scope
Member intent triggers for routing common requests into preferences and task flows
Crisis handling, organizer access, surprise privacy, and archival for complex events
Guidance for linking event canvases to creative, client, operations, and recurring program canvases
